blockers.description: Phase 9 requires trained model weights which need actual training run (30-90 min on MPS)
blockers.workaround: Run: pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 -m scripts.train --data-dir datasets/assembled

human_actions_pending.action: Install ML dependencies and run training
human_actions_pending.context: scripts/train.py is ready but actual fine-tuning needs torch/peft/trl installed and ~30-90 min on Apple Silicon

decisions.decision: Use all 3,630 samples with natural imbalance (68/16.5/15.4)
decisions.rationale: More data preferred over strict 33/33/33 balance

decisions.decision: MPS primary training target with 16-bit LoRA (no QLoRA on MPS)
decisions.rationale: bitsandbytes doesn't support MPS; Unsloth requires CUDA

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 9 --chain after training completes and model weights exist at models/lyra-merged/
context_notes: Phases 1-8 complete. The project has all data pipeline, datasets, assembly, and training scripts ready. The actual training run is a manual step the user needs to execute before Phase 9 (benchmarking) can proceed. Phase 9 evaluates the trained model against benchmarks and publishes to HuggingFace.
